en.plugin.description: Unified AI format transformer supporting Anthropic, OpenAI, and Gemini
en.metadata.name: AI Transformer
en.transformation.label: Transformation Direction
en.transformation.description: Select the AI format transformation direction
en.modelMapping.label: Model Mapping
en.modelMapping.description: Map source models to target provider models (select from list or enter custom values)
en.modelMapping.placeholder: Add source and target model mapping
en.apiMode.label: Anthropic → OpenAI API mode
en.apiMode.description: Controls which OpenAI endpoint is used for Anthropic-to-OpenAI conversion. This setting applies only to Anthropic → OpenAI.
en.anthropicMaxTokens.label: Anthropic max tokens
en.anthropicMaxTokens.description: Fallback max_tokens (and Gemini maxOutputTokens in O2G path) when request does not provide explicit token limits.
en.g2oLowThreshold.label: G2O low reasoning threshold
en.g2oLowThreshold.description: Thinking budget below this value maps to low reasoning effort.
en.g2oHighThreshold.label: G2O high reasoning threshold
en.g2oHighThreshold.description: Thinking budget at or above this value maps to high reasoning effort.
en.o2aLowTokens.label: O2A low effort tokens
en.o2aLowTokens.description: Anthropic thinking budget mapped from OpenAI low reasoning effort.
en.o2aMediumTokens.label: O2A medium effort tokens
en.o2aMediumTokens.description: Anthropic thinking budget mapped from OpenAI medium reasoning effort.
en.o2aHighTokens.label: O2A high effort tokens
en.o2aHighTokens.description: Anthropic thinking budget mapped from OpenAI high reasoning effort.
en.o2aXhighTokens.label: O2A xhigh effort tokens
en.o2aXhighTokens.description: Anthropic thinking budget mapped from OpenAI xhigh reasoning effort.
en.o2gLowTokens.label: O2G low effort tokens
en.o2gLowTokens.description: Gemini thinking budget mapped from OpenAI low reasoning effort.
en.o2gMediumTokens.label: O2G medium effort tokens
en.o2gMediumTokens.description: Gemini thinking budget mapped from OpenAI medium reasoning effort.
en.o2gHighTokens.label: O2G high effort tokens
en.o2gHighTokens.description: Gemini thinking budget mapped from OpenAI high reasoning effort.
en.o2gXhighTokens.label: O2G xhigh effort tokens
en.o2gXhighTokens.description: Gemini thinking budget mapped from OpenAI xhigh reasoning effort.
en.options.anthropic_openai.label: Anthropic → OpenAI
en.options.anthropic_openai.description: Transform from Claude API to OpenAI GPT API
en.options.openai_anthropic.label: OpenAI → Anthropic
en.options.openai_anthropic.description: Transform from OpenAI GPT API to Claude API
en.options.anthropic_gemini.label: Anthropic → Gemini
en.options.anthropic_gemini.description: Transform from Claude API to Google Gemini API
en.options.gemini_anthropic.label: Gemini → Anthropic
en.options.gemini_anthropic.description: Transform from Google Gemini API to Claude API
en.options.openai_gemini.label: OpenAI → Gemini
en.options.openai_gemini.description: Transform from OpenAI GPT API to Google Gemini API
en.options.gemini_openai.label: Gemini → OpenAI
en.options.gemini_openai.description: Transform from Google Gemini API to OpenAI GPT API

zh-CN.plugin.description: 统一的 AI 格式转换器，支持 Anthropic、OpenAI 和 Gemini
zh-CN.metadata.name: AI 格式转换器
zh-CN.transformation.label: 转换方向
zh-CN.transformation.description: 选择 AI 格式转换方向
zh-CN.modelMapping.label: 模型映射
zh-CN.modelMapping.description: 将源模型映射为目标提供商模型（支持下拉选择或自定义输入）
zh-CN.modelMapping.placeholder: 添加源模型与目标模型映射
zh-CN.apiMode.label: Anthropic → OpenAI 接口模式
zh-CN.apiMode.description: 控制 Anthropic 转 OpenAI 时使用的 OpenAI 接口。仅对 Anthropic → OpenAI 生效。
zh-CN.anthropicMaxTokens.label: Anthropic 最大输出 token
zh-CN.anthropicMaxTokens.description: 当请求未提供明确输出上限时，作为 Anthropic max_tokens（以及 O2G 路径中的 Gemini maxOutputTokens）兜底值。
zh-CN.g2oLowThreshold.label: G2O 低推理阈值
zh-CN.g2oLowThreshold.description: thinking budget 低于该值时映射为 low 推理强度。
zh-CN.g2oHighThreshold.label: G2O 高推理阈值
zh-CN.g2oHighThreshold.description: thinking budget 大于等于该值时映射为 high 推理强度。
zh-CN.o2aLowTokens.label: O2A low 映射 token
zh-CN.o2aLowTokens.description: OpenAI low 推理强度映射到 Anthropic thinking budget 的 token 值。
zh-CN.o2aMediumTokens.label: O2A medium 映射 token
zh-CN.o2aMediumTokens.description: OpenAI medium 推理强度映射到 Anthropic thinking budget 的 token 值。
zh-CN.o2aHighTokens.label: O2A high 映射 token
zh-CN.o2aHighTokens.description: OpenAI high 推理强度映射到 Anthropic thinking budget 的 token 值。
zh-CN.o2aXhighTokens.label: O2A xhigh 映射 token
zh-CN.o2aXhighTokens.description: OpenAI xhigh 推理强度映射到 Anthropic thinking budget 的 token 值。
zh-CN.o2gLowTokens.label: O2G low 映射 token
zh-CN.o2gLowTokens.description: OpenAI low 推理强度映射到 Gemini thinking budget 的 token 值。
zh-CN.o2gMediumTokens.label: O2G medium 映射 token
zh-CN.o2gMediumTokens.description: OpenAI medium 推理强度映射到 Gemini thinking budget 的 token 值。
zh-CN.o2gHighTokens.label: O2G high 映射 token
zh-CN.o2gHighTokens.description: OpenAI high 推理强度映射到 Gemini thinking budget 的 token 值。
zh-CN.o2gXhighTokens.label: O2G xhigh 映射 token
zh-CN.o2gXhighTokens.description: OpenAI xhigh 推理强度映射到 Gemini thinking budget 的 token 值。
zh-CN.options.anthropic_openai.label: Anthropic → OpenAI
zh-CN.options.anthropic_openai.description: 将 Claude API 转换为 OpenAI GPT API
zh-CN.options.openai_anthropic.label: OpenAI → Anthropic
zh-CN.options.openai_anthropic.description: 将 OpenAI GPT API 转换为 Claude API
zh-CN.options.anthropic_gemini.label: Anthropic → Gemini
zh-CN.options.anthropic_gemini.description: 将 Claude API 转换为 Google Gemini API
zh-CN.options.gemini_anthropic.label: Gemini → Anthropic
zh-CN.options.gemini_anthropic.description: 将 Google Gemini API 转换为 Claude API
zh-CN.options.openai_gemini.label: OpenAI → Gemini
zh-CN.options.openai_gemini.description: 将 OpenAI GPT API 转换为 Google Gemini API
zh-CN.options.gemini_openai.label: Gemini → OpenAI
zh-CN.options.gemini_openai.description: 将 Google Gemini API 转换为 OpenAI GPT API
